records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3301
Flashcards
In Uptip 180, who is identified as the 
son of Mani (alias Vidhyapati)?
Sone.
3302
Flashcards
Bhayo Jha is the son of Sone and 
belongs to which Mool according to the 
text?
Khandwala.
3303
Flashcards
Which village is the daughter of 
Chandreshwar, Ganganath, linked to in 
Uptip 180?
Sodarpur.
3304
Flashcards
Who is the son of Rameshwar from the 
Khandwala Mool recorded in section 
2.91?
Raghunath.
3305
Flashcards
In Uptip 181, Gauri Shankar is recorded 
as having which two sons?
Shivshankar and Vishnu.
3306
Flashcards
Durgapati, the son of Yogeshwar, is 
associated with which village lineage?
Budhwal.
3307
Flashcards
The son of Amarendra, named Loknath, 
is associated with which village in 
section 2.92?
Irauri.
3308
Flashcards
In the lineage of Phuchi, who is the 
father of the daughter named 
Kalikeshwar?
Modapati.
3309
Flashcards
In the lineage records of Sulhani (Uptip 
183), who are the three daughters of 
Sone?
Bhairavdatta, Chintamani, and Chhotkani.
3310
Flashcards
The academic/scholarly title 'Maho' 
(Mahopadhyay) is prefixed to which son 
of Bhairavdatta?
Bachi.
3311
Flashcards
In Uptip 183, which son of Ananta is 
recorded as being from the Kodariya 
village?
Narayan Ji.
3312
Flashcards
Who is the son of Madan Mohan 
recorded from the village of Gangoli?
Shailesh.
3313
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Umesh 
recorded in the Sarisab village records?
Lakshmikant and Shri Dev.
3314
Flashcards
In Uptip 185, who is the son of Harijiv 
belonging to the Sakaradhi Mool?
Balbhadra.
3315
Flashcards
Chhatranath is the son of which person 
from the Sarisab Mool according to 
section 2.94?
Kashinath.
3316
Flashcards
The son of Shesha, named Yuganath, is 
associated with which Mool in section 
2.94?
Khandwala.
3317
Flashcards
In Uptip 186, the daughter of 
Shambhunath (alias Shobhanath) is 
recorded as being married into which 
village?
Madar.
3318
Flashcards
What village is associated with the 
'Mool' of Bhavadev in Uptip 167?
Puaripa.
3319
Flashcards
Under the record for Hanu's daughter, 
Bhavanidatta is the son of whom?
Harinath.
3320
Flashcards
The daughter of Ganganath is married 
into the family of which royal individual 
from Alaya?
Raja Kritiyanand Singh.
3321
Flashcards
In Uptip 169, Kamoladatta is the 
daughter of whom?
Bechan.
3322
Flashcards
The son of Bhagwanadatta, named 
Chhandradev, belongs to which Mool?
Karmaha.
3323
Flashcards
According to Uptip 170, the daughter of 
Bagdu is married into which Mool?
Karmaha.
3324
Flashcards
In the context of the Mithila Panji 
Prabandh, what does the term 'Sut' 
denote?
Son.
3325
Flashcards
What relationship is indicated by the 
term 'Suta' in these genealogical 
excerpts?
Daughter.
3326
Flashcards
In the genealogical records, what does 
the term 'Dau' (or 'Dauo') represent?
The maternal grandfather or the maternal lineage 
connection.
3327
Flashcards
According to entry 187, who is the 
father of Badri in the Punwaripath 
Suluhani lineage?
Govinda.
3328
Flashcards
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) 
of Badri, as recorded in the first entry of 
the text.
Badu, the son of Prannath from Sakaradhi.
3329
Flashcards
The individual Khadagi, son of Jaladhar, 
belongs to which specific village 
lineage?
Maudar.
3330
Flashcards
In entry 187, who is recorded as the 
father of the brothers Chandranath and 
Lokanath?
Badu.
3331
Flashcards
Who is the father of the brothers 
Dinanath and Balli in the Niruadh 
Shivnath lineage?
Shivnath.
3332
Flashcards
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) 
of Dinanath from the Khandabala 
lineage.
Sarvajeet Singh, the son of Kamal Singh.
3333
Flashcards
Dwarikanath is recorded in the lineage as 
the son of which individual?
Dinanath.
3334
Flashcards
According to entry 188, who is 
identified as the son of Buddhikar?
Tejnanath.
3335
Flashcards
Tejnanath's maternal lineage (Dau) is 
traced back to which individual from the 
Sarisab village?
Devidutt, the son of Bhawanidutt.
3336
Flashcards
In the Panji records, who is the father of 
Gaurinath in the Ghanghi lineage?
Ghanghi.
3337
Flashcards
Gaurinath's lineage identifies his 'Dau' 
as coming from which individual and 
village?
Maninath, the son of Dharmanath from 
Khandabala.
3338
Flashcards
The individual Balamukund is identified 
as the son of _____.
Manihar.
3339
Flashcards
In entry 189, the siblings Pramod, 
Subodh, and Balabodh are the children 
of which father?
Parashuram.
3340
Flashcards
Who is the 'Dau' of Parashuram's son, 
Pramod?
Gauridutt, the son of Tirthadutt from Sodarpur.
3341
Flashcards
Identify the sons of Tuna as recorded in 
entry 189 of the genealogical text.
Taranath, Dharmnath, and Bhagiratha.
3342
Flashcards
In the lineage of Shaktinath Singh 
(Champanagar Deodhi), who is the 
father of Jagannath?
Buddhinath.
3343
Flashcards
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) 
of Jagannath from the Shaktinath Singh 
lineage.
Thethai, the son of Bhawanidutt from Sodarpur.
3344
Flashcards
According to entry 190, who are the two 
sons of Pushpanath?
Harshanath and Munika.
3345
Flashcards
Who is the 'Dau' of Harshanath, the son 
of Pushpanath?
Badu, the son of Teknath from Karmaha.
3346
Flashcards
Madhusudan's son, mentioned in the 
lineage of entry 190, is named _____.
Dharmanath.
3347
Flashcards
Who is the father of Kapileshwar in the 
lineage of Rathinath?
Rathinath (specifically the Kakhantar 
progenitor).
3348
Flashcards
Kapileshwar's daughter is recorded as 
being married to the son of _____ from 
Khandabala.
Vishnu Singh's son Chandreshwar Singh.
3349
Flashcards
In the Alaya lineage (entry 190), who is 
the son of Brahmanand?
Mithilesh.
3350
Flashcards
The 'Dau' of Mithilesh is identified as 
which specific judicial figure?
Rathikanth, the son of Harikanth.
3351
Flashcards
Amarnath and Vijaynath are the sons of 
_____ in the progeny of Phuchi.
Phuchi (Shaktinath progenitor).
3352
Flashcards
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) 
of Amarnath and Vijaynath.
Bhagwat Narayan, the son of Chiranjiv from 
Tisaunt.
3353
Flashcards
In entry 191, Jivan and Gadapani are 
identified as the sons of _____.
Banka Umanath.
3354
Flashcards
Who is the father of Baijnath in the 
lineage of Jivan?
Nityanand.
3355
Flashcards
Tirthanath's 'Dau' is recorded as being 
the son of _____ from the Bulwal 
village.
Vidyaman, the son of Lulli.
3356
Flashcards
Identify the father of the scholar Sir 
Ganganath Jha, as mentioned in entry 
191.
Vaidyanath Jha.
3357
Flashcards
Sir Ganganath Jha's maternal lineage 
(Dau) is connected to which progenitor 
from Sakaradhi?
Harshanath.
3358
Flashcards
In entry 192, Janakinath is identified as 
the son of _____.
Dayanath.
3359
Flashcards
Janakinath's maternal grandfather is 
from which prominent lineage in 
Khandabala?
The Maharaja Madhav Singh lineage.
3360
Flashcards
Identify the sons of Faujdar Badrinath as 
listed in entry 193.
Vishvanath, Raghunandan, and Akshayanath.
3361
Flashcards
Who is the father of Harinand in the 
lineage of Vishvanath?
Vishvanath.
3362
Flashcards
In the genealogical records, Sitanand is 
identified as the son of _____.
Brajanand.
3363
Flashcards
In the Sodarpur lineage (entry 193), who 
is the father of Sachidanand?
Ramabhadra, the son of Pridhitnath.
3364
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Vabu 
Manmohan recorded in entry 194.
Purandar (Tejnanath) and Phude (Ganganath).
3365
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Tejnanath in the 
Sodarpur lineage.
Punyanath and Kamalanath.
3366
Flashcards
The children of Kamalanath trace their 
maternal grandfather (Dau) to which 
individual from Sodarpur?
Baduji, the son of Thithar.
3367
Flashcards
According to entry 194, who is the 
father of Tankanath and Varadanand?
Keshavnath.
3368
Flashcards
Tankanath's maternal grandfather (Dau) 
is identified as _____ from the Pali 
village.
Jayanath, the son of Khaganath.
3369
Flashcards
Who is the father of Abhaynath in the 
Dhaneiyampuri lineage (entry 195)?
Bholanath.
3370
Flashcards
In the Darrihara lineage, Chandranath is 
recorded as the son of _____.
Tejnanath.
3371
Flashcards
Who is the father of the brothers 
Bhirvinath and Revatinath in entry 198?
Jagannath.
3372
Flashcards
In entry 197, Chatrapati's son Gopala 
identifies his 'Dau' (maternal line) as 
_____.
Durgaditya from the Maudar village.
3373
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Gopala from 
the Hemnath lineage?
Manohar and Chumman (Vabu).
3374
Flashcards
In the lineage of Manohar, the maternal 
grandfather (Dau) is recorded as _____ 
from Khandabala.
Madhav Singh.
3375
Flashcards
In entry 199, Raghunandan is identified 
as the son of _____.
Vabu Chumman.
3376
Flashcards
Identify the father of Ruchipati, 
Bholanath, and Eknath as listed in entry 
203.
Gangadutt.
3377
Flashcards
In the Panji records, who is the son of 
Ruchipati?
Pachkaudi.
3378
Flashcards
In the progeny of Taranath (entry 204), 
who is the father of Prof. Tankanath?
Taranath.
3379
Flashcards
Identify the sons of Maninath as listed in 
the 204th entry of the record.
Jivanath, Devinath, and Dipnath.
3380
Flashcards
According to entry 205, Ugranath is a 
professor of which academic discipline?
Sociology (Samajshastri).
3381
Flashcards
Who is the father of the brothers 
Shambhunath and Umanath in entry 190?
Phaturi (Shobhanath progenitor).
3382
Flashcards
The village 'Karmaha' is frequently 
mentioned in the records as the seat of 
the progenitor _____.
Jalpadutt.
3383
Flashcards
The individual Lakshminath's 'Dau' 
(maternal grandfather) is linked to which 
person from Khandabala?
Prannath, the son of Maninath.
3384
Flashcards
Who is the father of the brothers 
Shivnath and Sumatinath in entry 200?
Bholanath.
3385
Flashcards
The 'Dau' of Shivnath and Sumatinath is 
identified as _____ from the Phandaha 
village.
Madhukanth, the son of Maungu.
3386
Flashcards
In the Punwaripath lineage, who is 
recorded as the son of Muktinath?
Dharmanath.
3387
Flashcards
Dharmanath's maternal grandfather is 
from which lineage in the Pali village?
Damodar, the son of Manibhar.
3388
Flashcards
The excerpts identify 'Raja Lilaianand 
Singh' as the son of which King?
Raja Vedanand Singh.
3389
Flashcards
Who is the father of the brothers 
Ramabhadra and Virabhadra in entry 
206?
Balabhadra.
3390
Flashcards
Ramabhadra's maternal lineage (Dau) is 
traced to which person in the Pali 
village?
Kedarnath, the son of Purandar.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3391
Flashcards
According to entry 191, who is the 'Dau' 
(maternal grandfather) of the sons of 
Banka Umanath?
Motinand, the son of Nityanand from Darihara.
3392
Flashcards
In the Maithil Panji genealogical 
records, what does the term 'Sut' 
(à¤¸à¥ à¤¤) denote?
It denotes 'son'.
3393
Flashcards
What does the term 'Suta' 
(à¤¸à¥ à¤¤à¤¾) indicate when listing 
names in these records?
It indicates 'sons' (plural).
3394
Flashcards
In the context of Panji entries, what does 
the abbreviation 'Ddau' (à¤¦à¥ à¤¦à¥Œo) 
signify?
It refers to a genealogical link, typically a 
daughter's marriage or a specific lineage 
connection.
3395
Flashcards
Which major Maithil Brahmin lineage is 
associated with the village 'Sodarpur'?
The Sodarpur Sakhi.
3396
Flashcards
According to the Loam village records, 
who was the father of Raja Devanarayan?
Ray Chandrarayan.
3397
Flashcards
Who succeeded Raja Devanarayan as 
'Ray Ramnarayan'?
His son, Ray Ramnarayan.
3398
Flashcards
The title 'M.M.U.' found before names 
like Gangesh stands for _____.
Mahamahopadhyaya.
3399
Flashcards
Who was the son of Maharaja Madhav 
Singh mentioned in the genealogical 
transitions?
Maharaj Chhatra Singh.
3400
Flashcards
According to the lineage of Maharaja 
Chhatra Singh, who was his son that 
became 'Maharudra Singh'?
Maharaj Rudra Singh.
3401
Flashcards
Who was the father of Maharaja 
Lakshmishwar Singh and Maharaja 
Rameshwar Singh?
Maharaja Maheshwar Singh.
3402
Flashcards
Identify the son of Maharaja Rameshwar 
Singh who held the title of 'Maharaj'.
Maharaj Kameshwar Singh.
3403
Flashcards
Who was the son of Maharaja 
Kameshwar Singh's brother, Babu 
Vishweshwar Singh?
Babu Jiveshwar Singh.
3404
Flashcards
In the Panji records, what is the 
significance of the term 'Gram' 
(à¤—à¥ à¤°à¤¾à¤®)?
It identifies the village of origin for a particular 
lineage or family branch.
3405
Flashcards
Who was the son of Chandrapati from 
the Paboli lineage mentioned in the 
Loam section?
Raghunandan.
3406
Flashcards
Identify the son of Ray Ramnarayan 
known as 'Ray Driggopalnarayan'.
Ray Driggopalnarayan.
3407
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gopal Narayan, also 
known by the alias 'Phuchi'?
Baldev Narayan.
3408
Flashcards
According to the records of the Alaya 
lineage, who was the son of Ray 
Jaynarayan?
Harinarayan.
3409
Flashcards
Which son of Raja Roopnarayan is listed 
as 'Eknarayan'?
Ray Eknarayan.
3410
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Sheshnarayan 
(also known as Shivji)?
Premnarayan and Upendranarayan.
3411
Flashcards
Name the son of Upendranarayan 
mentioned in the Khandavala lineage.
Ramendranarayan.
3412
Flashcards
Who was the son of Raghunandan (alias 
Lilanand) from the Vedanand lineage?
Umanand Narayan.
3413
Flashcards
Identify the son of Umanand Narayan 
mentioned in the records.
Nikhil Narayan.
3414
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Satyanarayan 
recorded in the Ekahara lineage?
Sanjeev and Sameer.
3415
Flashcards
In the Shankar lineage, who was the 
father of Shankar and Chandrashekhar?
Dakshanand Narayan.
3416
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gyanendra Narayan 
associated with the village Karmaha?
Vidyapati Singh.
3417
Flashcards
According to the Kujouli records, who 
was the son of Meghakar?
Shobhakar.
3418
Flashcards
Who was the son of Shivakar mentioned 
in the same section as Shobhakar?
Haranath.
3419
Flashcards
The son of Haranath, referred to as 
'Vucha', also held the name _____.
Kishornath.
3420
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Kishornath 
(Vucha)?
Dinanath and Khelnath.
3421
Flashcards
Identify the son of Dinanath who was a 
'Dau' to the Mandar lineage.
Muktinath.
3422
Flashcards
Who was the son of Muktinath recorded 
in the Karmaha lineage?
Vishwanath.
3423
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Khelnath from the 
Pali lineage.
Lekhnath and Damodar.
3424
Flashcards
Who was the son of Amritakar 
mentioned in the Mandar lineage?
Vidyakar.
3425
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Manmohan 
mentioned in the context of Maharaja 
Chhatra Singh.
Baldev and Jayadev.
3426
Flashcards
Who was the son of Baldev recorded as 
a Professor and Sociologist?
Prof. Hetukar.
3427
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Prof. Hetukar 
mentioned in the text.
Tejkar and Kar (unspecified).
3428
Flashcards
Who was the son of Ratnakar from the 
village of Lohna?
Lilakar.
3429
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Gadakar from the 
village of Lohna?
Chetkar and Achyutkar.
3430
Flashcards
What was the professional title of Dr 
Chetkar, son of Gadakar?
Principal of B.N. College, Patna.
3431
Flashcards
Who was the son of Dr Chetkar?
Prabhakar.
3432
Flashcards
Identify the son of Achyutkar recorded in 
the Karmaha lineage.
Ramesh.
3433
Flashcards
Who was the son of Upendra Kar, 
holding the military rank of Lt. Colonel?
Lt. Colonel Gunakar.
3434
Flashcards
In the Kanhali village records, who were 
the sons of Bhavadatta?
Damodar and Manohar.
3435
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Damodar, son of 
Bhavadatta?
Manmohan and Dandapani (Gudari).
3436
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Dandapani.
Ghurghur, Chakradatta, and Muktidatta.
3437
Flashcards
Who was the son of Rai Bahadur 
Shrinath from the Ruchouli lineage?
Yagyanath (alias Jagannath).
3438
Flashcards
Name the son of Yagyanath (Jagannath) 
who held a doctorate.
Dr Amarnath.
3439
Flashcards
Who was the son of Ugrasingh 
mentioned in the Bhour Khandavala 
section?
Mohan Singh.
3440
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Mohan Singh in 
the Bhour lineage?
Kishor Singh and Mukund Singh.
3441
Flashcards
Identify the son of Kishor Singh 
mentioned in the Khandavala records.
Devakinandan Singh.
3442
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mukund Singh 
recorded in the Bhour lineage?
Devaraj Singh.
3443
Flashcards
Name the sons of Devaraj Singh.
Jayraj, Brajraj, Riphuraj, Nagraj, and Vijayraj 
Singh.
3444
Flashcards
Who was the son of Jayraj Singh 
recorded in the Bhour lineage?
Mahiraj Singh.
3445
Flashcards
According to the Jagat Singh lineage, 
who was his son?
Dayanath Singh.
3446
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Damodar Singh 
mentioned alongside Krishna Singh?
Gopinath and Raghuvir Singh.
3447
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gopinath Singh in 
the Darihara lineage?
Ruchinath Singh.
3448
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Ruchinath Singh?
Shashinath and Bholanath Singh.
3449
Flashcards
Identify the son of Raghuvir Singh who 
is associated with the Darihara village.
Bhimnath Singh.
3450
Flashcards
Who was the son of Bhimnath Singh?
Govindnath Singh.
3451
Flashcards
Who was the son of Govindnath Singh 
mentioned in the Pali lineage?
Abhayanath.
3452
Flashcards
Identify the son of Roopnath Singh.
Chetnath Singh.
3453
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Harinath Singh?
Prof. Bhaktinath, Raghunath, and Chhatranath 
Singh.
3454
Flashcards
Who was the son of Prof. Bhaktinath 
Singh?
Hemanath Singh.
3455
Flashcards
Name the son of Chhatranath Singh.
Lokinath Singh Thakur.
3456
Flashcards
Who was the son of Vishwanath Singh 
recorded in the Sakaradhi lineage?
Muninath Singh.
3457
Flashcards
Identify the son of Poornath Singh who 
served as a Member of the Legislative 
Assembly (Bihar).
Kamalnath Singh Thakur.
3458
Flashcards
Who was the son of Kamalnath Singh 
Thakur?
Chandan Singh.
3459
Flashcards
According to the Darihara lineage, who 
was the son of Gokhulnath?
Ishanath.
3460
Flashcards
Who was the son of Ishanath recorded in 
the Khaual lineage?
Bholanath.
3461
Flashcards
Identify the son of Bholanath from the 
Darihara lineage.
Vishwanath.
3462
Flashcards
Who was the son of Vishwanath 
mentioned in the Sodarpur Sakhi?
Vedidhar.
3463
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gananath recorded 
in the Sakaradhi lineage?
Dineshwar Nath.
3464
Flashcards
Name the son of Dineshwar Nath 
mentioned in the Hariamba lineage.
Ramesh.
3465
Flashcards
What is the primary subject of Section 3 
in the provided Mithila genealogical 
records?
The Nagaram branch of lineages.
3466
Flashcards
According to the document, what time 
period does the Mithila Panji 
management (Genome Mapping) cover?
450 AD to 2009 AD.
3467
Flashcards
What is the meaning of the genealogical 
term 'Sut' in the context of these records?
Son.
3468
Flashcards
In Mithila Panji records, what does the 
term 'Suta' indicate?
Daughter.
3469
Flashcards
The term 'Dau' is an abbreviation for 
'Dauhitra', which refers to a _____.
Grandson through a daughter (maternal 
grandson).
3470
Flashcards
Which two locations mark the extent of 
the lineage described in the first 
subsection of Nagaram?
Sandahpur to Singhwara.
3471
Flashcards
Who is identified as the father of Udayan 
in the Sandahpur to Singhwara lineage?
Gunakar.
3472
Flashcards
Which individual's alias (Pram) is listed 
as 'Hira' in the Sandahpur records?
Harshani.
3473
Flashcards
According to the Nagaram records, who 
was the father of Nageshwar?
Vinnu.
3474
Flashcards
Who is recorded as the father of 
Amarnath in the Nagaram lineage?
Nageshwar.
3475
Flashcards
In the Shishupur lineage, who are the 
two sons of Bandhu?
Madhurapati and Narapati.
3476
Flashcards
Who is the father of Banchh and 
Shivanandan in the Shishupur section?
Madhurapati.
3477
Flashcards
Which village is linked to the maternal 
grandson (Dau) relationship for Banchh?
Belunch.
3478
Flashcards
Who are recorded as the sons of 
Damodar in the Shishupur records?
Vamsidhar and Yogindro.
3479
Flashcards
Identify the father of the siblings 
Hemnath, Kumudnath, and Ganganath in 
the Shishupur records.
Kedarnath.
3480
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Ravindranath, 
as mentioned in the Shishupur (Nahar) 
section?
Ramanjeet and Ravindranath (identified by alias 
Raman Ji).
3481
Flashcards
The 'Katka' branch of the family is 
described as descending from which 
original village?
Sandahpur.
3482
Flashcards
Who is the father of Khushihal Singh in 
the Katka lineage?
Narapati.
3483
Flashcards
In the Katka records, who are the two 
sons of Babulal?
Dhanukdhari and Dharnidhara.
3484
Flashcards
Identify the father of Surya Narayan and 
Shri Narayan in the Katka Sandahpur 
records.
Singheshwar.
3485
Flashcards
Who is the wife of Shri Narayan as 
mentioned in the Sandahpur to Katka 
lineage?
Anita.
3486
Flashcards
Which Purnia-based individual is the 
subject of the subsection 'Banaili, 
Purnia'?
Mitranath Jha.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
3487
Flashcards
Who was the father of Dharnidhar and 
Panji Krishnadev?
Panji Kamlapati.
3488
Flashcards
Identify the father of Panji Chan in the 
Banaili records.
Panji Krishnadev.
3489
Flashcards
In the Banaili records, who is the son of 
Buddhinath?
Mitranath.
3490
Flashcards
Who was the father of Buddhinath in the 
Mitranath Jha lineage?
Jai Krishna.
3491
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
lineage of Ugranth Jha?
Rahua.
3492
Flashcards
Who is recorded as the father of Ugranth 
Jha?
Batesh.
3493
Flashcards
Who were the four children of Panji Jai

Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Chiranjiv 
mentioned in the text?
Lilanand and Prabhakar.
6114
Flashcards
Who is the son of Mukunda in the 
Jhanjharpur/Simariya lineage?
Nakchedi.
6115
Flashcards
Nakchedi is the father of which seven 
sons?
Tarakant, Mayakant, Chatarkant, Radhakant, 
Itarkant, Krishnakant, and Navkant.
6116
Flashcards
Who is the father of Madhukar in the 
lineage of Bhora?
Bhora.
6117
Flashcards
Name the son of Madhukar recorded in 
the lineage of Bhora.
Tangri.
6118
Flashcards
Identify the son of Tangri in the lineage 
of Bhora.
Nandadev.
6119
Flashcards
Who is the son of Nandadev in the 
genealogical records of Bhora?
Bhangi.
6120
Flashcards
Who is the father of the sons Jagannath, 
Kashinath, and Shambhunath?
Pranamohan.
6121
Flashcards
What is the name of the son of Umesh in 
the Sultanpur lineage?
Abhishek.
6122
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Kityanand 
mentioned in the text?
Amarnath and Dinanath.
6123
Flashcards
Who is the father of the sons Sudhir and 
Sunil in the lineage of Tirthanand?
Tirthanand.
6124
Flashcards
In the context of the Panji records, what 
is the meaning of the term 'Suta'?
Son.
6125
Flashcards
According to the Sultanpur records, who 
are the two sons of Chaudhari 
Girananand?
Parmanand and Durganand.
6126
Flashcards
Who is the father of the sons Santosh 
and Amol in the lineage of Dayanand?
Dayanand.
6127
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Digambar in 
the Jhanjharpur lineage?
Pitambar and Ashutosh.
6128
Flashcards
Identify the son of Ashutosh recorded in 
the lineage of Kashinath.
Vinay.
6129
Flashcards
Who is the father of the education expert 
and advocate Rajendra?
Vishwadarshan.
6130
Flashcards
What is the primary subject of the 
provided source material?
The genealogical mapping and history of the 
Maithil Panji system from 450 A.D. to 2009 
A.D.
6131
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Krishna Mohan 
mentioned in the Charpura Nahas 
lineage?
Vinod Mohan, Pramod Mohan, Kumod Mohan, 
and Mukesh Mohan.
6132
Flashcards
Which professional titles are held by 
Vinod Mohan?
He holds an M.A. degree.
6133
Flashcards
What are the names of Vinod Mohan's 
children?
Sanket, Swapnil, Saurabh, and Vipasha.
6134
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Ganesh Mohan in 
the Charpura Nahas lineage?
Prakash, Vikas, and Prabhat (also known as 
Manish).
6135
Flashcards
What is the professional specialisation 
of Ganesh Mohan?
He is an advocate (B.L.) and a gemologist 
(Ratna Visheshagya).
6136
Flashcards
Name the sons of Madhav Mohan 
mentioned in the Dharmapur branch.
Surya Mohan, Uddhav Mohan, Chandan, and 
Manmohan.
6137
Flashcards
Who is described as a 'Virtuous and 
Awarded Farmer' (Sadachari Karmath 
Puraskrit Krishak)?
Visheshwar Mohan.
6138
Flashcards
In the Dharmapur Dharmadiha branch, 
who was the father of Bhavaninath?
Vishwambhar.
6139
Flashcards
The first Maithil Brahmin Empress 
mentioned in the text is _____.
Queen Indraivati
6140
Flashcards
What was the reign period of Queen 
Indraivati?
The reign was from 1776 to 1803.
6141
Flashcards
Who served as the Chief Advisor 
(Pradhan Amatya) to Queen Indraivati?
Thakuren Thakur, the son of Vyakarana Charnan 
Thakur.
6142
Flashcards
Name the sons of Maharaja Samar Singh 
of the Purnia district.
Chaturdharik Krishnadev and Haridev.
6143
Flashcards
What was the rule period of Maharaja 
Samar Singh?
He ruled from 1550 to 1625 A.D.
6144
Flashcards
Maharaja Ramchandra Narayan ruled 
during which period?
His rule lasted from 1700 to 1760 A.D.
6145
Flashcards
Who was the successor of Maharaja 
Ramchandra Narayan?
Maharajadhiraja Indra Narayan.
6146
Flashcards
What was the rule period of Maharaja 
Indra Narayan?
He ruled from 1760 to 1776 A.D.
6147
Flashcards
In the context of the Panji system, what 
does the root word 'Pand' signify?
It means to collect, gather, or accumulate 
information.
6148
Flashcards
Who was the pioneer (Agua) of the 
systematic collection of genealogical 
introductions (Parichay Sangraha)?
Sadupadhyaya Gunakar.
6149
Flashcards
During what approximate years did 
Gunakar live?
His life was approximately from 1275 to 1350 
A.D.
6150
Flashcards
Which Karnat dynasty king is associated 
with the formalisation of the Panji 
system?
Maharaja Harasimha Dev.
6151
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gunakar who 
continued his genealogical work?
Pranadhar.
6152
Flashcards
Name the four sons of Anandakar who 
were involved in the Panji management.
Kathi, Madhav, Keshav, and Narayan.
6153
Flashcards
What is the primary purpose of the Panji 
system as defined by the text?
To ensure lineage purity (Jati Shuddhi) and 
blood purity (Rakta Shuddhi) for marriages.
6154
Flashcards
Who was the author of the 
'Tantravarttika' which mentions 
genealogical record-keeping in the 8th 
century?
Kumarila Bhatta.
6155
Flashcards
Which ancient text's 'Bal Kanda' is cited 
to show the tradition of examining 
lineage before marriage?
The Valmiki Ramayana.
6156
Flashcards
Who were the five sons of Raul Thame 
in the Loam Suragan branch?
Chandeshwar, Dhareshwar, Someshwar, 
Bhogishwar, and Yogishwar.
6157
Flashcards
Which son of Raul Thame was a resident 
of Keunti and a scholar of all four 
Vedas?
Chandeshwar.
6158
Flashcards
The sons of Gaean were Vishweshwar 
and _____.
Sureshwar
6159
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gunakar mentioned 
as a Mahamahopadhyaya?
Pathak Govinda.
6160
Flashcards
What was the profession of Nageshwar, 
the son of Shambhola?
He was a respected lawyer (B.L.).
6161
Flashcards
Name the sons of Nageshwar mentioned 
in the Purnia branch.
Dilip, Pradeep, and Sudhir.
6162
Flashcards
In the Dharmapur branch, who is the son 
of Ramanand working as an Agriculture 
Director?
Ashutosh Kishore.
6163
Flashcards
Who was the mother of Maharaja 
Ramchandra Narayan?
Maharani Vedavati.
6164
Flashcards
Which Queen is credited with building 
schools, roads, and ponds during a 
famine?
Queen Indraivati.
6165
Flashcards
Who were the sons of the medical expert 
Dhiranath?
Bachcha, Mahesh, Rajballabh, and Ganesh.
6166
Flashcards
Which historical figure was the father of 
the Mahakavi Vidyapati's patron 
(Maharaja Shiva Singh)?
Maharaja Deva Singh (implied by the Shiva 
Singh reference in the context of Mahipati Jha).
6167
Flashcards
The lineage originating from the village 
Pandua Mahitarpur is known as the 
_____ lineage.
Pandua
6168
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Prithvidhar?
Manohar and Manodhar.
6169
Flashcards
Which son of Manodhar was also a 
renowned grammarian (Vaiyakarana)?
Mahopadhyaya Hemkar.
6170
Flashcards
What is the name of the scholar who 
taught the Panji Shastra to many 
students?
Mahopadhyaya Gunakar.
6171
Flashcards
Who was the son of Pranadhar whose 
four sons were 'Takwal'?
Anandakar.
6172
Flashcards
The sons of Kathi who became experts 
in the Panji Shastra were Ramkar, 
Ratnakar, and _____.
Shubhankar
6173
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Ramkar 
mentioned in the Pandua lineage?
Ladavan (Buddhikar) and Nonen.
6174
Flashcards
Which branch of the family is associated 
with 'Chunapur'?
The branch of Jhotan Jha.
6175
Flashcards
Who were the sons of the teacher Vinod 
mentioned in the Baradbatta branch?
Shailendra and Somendra.
6176
Flashcards
In the Baradbatta branch, who was the 
father of the grammarian Kalikanti?
Kedarnath.
6177
Flashcards
Name the sons of Kalikanti in the 
Baradbatta branch.
Shankar, Balgovind, and Vinod.
6178
Flashcards
Who is the son of Jayanarayan 
mentioned as the first motor mechanic 
of Purnia district?
Rai Jayanarayan.
6179
Flashcards
What are the names of Rai Jayanarayan's 
sons?
Rai Harinarayan, Rai Satyanarayan, and Rai 
Tejanarayan.
6180
Flashcards
The historical ruler of Hansara (Ancient 
Purnia) was _____.
Maharaja Samar Singh
6181
Flashcards
What are the names of the sons of Rai 
Kripa Narayan?
Bhagwati Narayan.
6182
Flashcards
Who was the father of Rai Bhagwati 
Narayan's sons (Manoj, Kumod, and 
Vinod)?
Rai Kripa Narayan.
6183
Flashcards
Which scholar is noted for being a 'Pulse 
Specialist' (Nadi Visheshagya)?
Ganesh (son of Dhiranath).
6184
Flashcards
Who was the son of Gunakar noted as 
the primary person to record the lineage 
information?
Sadupadhyaya Gunakar.
6185
Flashcards
The sons of Chatur Narayan (Chilka) 
include King Devanarayan and King 
_____.
Shri Narayan
6186
Flashcards
Who were the sons of King 
Devanarayan?
King Ramnarayan and King Rupnarayan.
6187
Flashcards
Name the sons of King Rajaram Narayan. Rai Kshetryanarayan, Rai Gopal Narayan, Rai 
Virnarayan, and Rai Hemnarayan.
6188
Flashcards
Who was the son of Rai Virnarayan 
noted as 'Phucchi'?
Rai Baldev Narayan.
6189
Flashcards
Which son of Gopalakanti is a journalist 
(Patrakar)?
B.L. Vidyanand.
6190
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Shaktirayapur 
Narun Mishra Prayag?
Ganga and Jagdish.
6191
Flashcards
Name the sons of Mishra Raghuni.
Harijeev, Hari, and Dhanaram.
6192
Flashcards
Who was the son of Mishra Dhanaram?
Atmaram.
6193
Flashcards
Name the sons of Mishra Atmaram.
Sanjeev, Chiranjeev, and Sabhapati.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
6194
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Mishra Sabhapati? Matini, Shankardutt, and Devidutt.
6195
Flashcards
Which son of Mishra Shankardutt lived 
in Dharmapur?
Srinath.
6196
Flashcards
Name the sons of Mishra Srinath.
Padarth, Chintamani, and Katyananda.
6197
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Mishra Padarth?
Kedarnath, Raghunath, and Umanath.
6198
Flashcards
Who is the principal with an M.A. and 
Ph.D. in the Narun branch?
Jayaprakash Narayan.
6199
Flashcards
Who was the son of Jayaprakash 
Narayan (the Principal)?
Aditya Narayan.
6200
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Lalit mentioned in 
the Narun branch.
Akshadhar and Durgadhar.
6201
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Akshadhar?
Haridev, Digambar, and Shridhar.
6202
Flashcards
Who was the son of Haridev mentioned 
in the Narun branch?
Narendra.
6203
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Digambar.
Sanjeev and Rajeev.
6204
Flashcards
In the Narun branch, who was the son of 
Shridhar?
Khalifa.
6205
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Lalit's son 
Jalandhar?
Shalandhar and Shatrughna.
6206
Flashcards
Name the sons of Shatrughna.
Subhash and Shankar.
6207
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Shashidhar?
Rameshwar and Kapileshwar.
6208
Flashcards
Name the sons of Rameshwar in the 
Narun branch.
Madhav, Gangesh, and Lambodara.
6209
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Vyakarana 
Gunakar mentioned as scholars?
Gunakar and his son Pranadhar.
6210
Flashcards
Which document lists the 'Guna-Dosha' 
(merits and demerits) of families to 
determine marriage suitability?
The Panji (genealogical records).
6211
Flashcards
Who was the son of Rai Rupnarayan?
Rai Rurnarayan.
6212
Flashcards
Name the two sons of Maharaja Shri 
Narayan.
King Rajendra Narayan and King Mahendra 
Narayan.
6213
Flashcards
Who was the son of Maharaja Mahendra 
Narayan?
Ruchaudhari.
6214
Flashcards
In the Dharmapur branch, who is the 
bank officer with an M.Sc. in 
Agriculture?
Ashutosh (son of Ramanand).
6215
Flashcards
What is the chronological span covered 
by the genealogical mapping (Panji 
Prabandha) of Mithila mentioned in the 
text?
450 AD to 2009 AD.
6216
Flashcards
Which historical scholar and manager of 
the Panji system lived between 1300 and 
1375 AD?
Lakhima Devi.
6217
Flashcards
What was the primary contribution of 
Lakhima Devi to the Panji system?
Developing the evolutionary path of Panji 
management and recording Dharmashastra.
6218
Flashcards
The Panji system classifies Brahmin 
lineages based on which four primary 
criteria?
Mool, Utetdh, Gotra, and Patra.
6219
Flashcards
Which specific Gotra is associated with 
the Gangoli Mool in the genealogical 
records?
Sandilya Gotra.
6220
Flashcards
Who introduced the 'Shakha Pustak' 
method to record Kulin Brahmin lineage 
and matrimonial links?
Panji Devanand Jha (also known as Choti Jha).
6221
Flashcards
Which dynasty provided patronage to 
Panji Devanand Jha in the village of 
Rasaad, Purnia?
The Surgan Loam dynasty.
6222
Flashcards
Who is identified as the founder of the 
Hindu Shara and Soriya Brahmin 
dynasties in Purnia around 1550 AD?
Maharaja Samar Singh.
6223
Flashcards
Who was the author of the Ayurvedic 
text 'Vedanand Vinod'?
Raja Bahadur Vedanand Singh.
6224
Flashcards
Which member of the Banaili family 
authored the book 'Banaili: Roots to 
Raj'?
Kumar Girijanand Singh (Raman Ji).
6225
Flashcards
Which Banaili family member served as 
the Education Minister of Bihar and 
President of the Hindu Mahasabha?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
6226
Flashcards
Who was the 'Sangeet Martand' of the 
Banaili family, known for his expertise 
in music?
Kumar Shyanamanand Singh.
6227
Flashcards
What were the four major estates or 
'Dyodhis' of the Banaili Raj mentioned 
in the text?
Ramnagar, Champanagar, Srinagar, and Garh 
Banaili.
6228
Flashcards
Raja Kirtyanand Singh of the Banaili Raj 
was active during which specific years?
1880 to 1938.
6229
Flashcards
Which Banaili branch is specifically 
associated with the 'Khadgi Jha' lineage?
Banaili Khadgi Jha.
6230
Flashcards
Which Banaili branch is specifically 
associated with the 'Chanan Jha' lineage?
Banaili Chanan Jha.
6231
Flashcards
The record mentions a specialist in the 
'Swadeshi Movement' and agriculture; 
who was he?
Kumar Vimalanand Singh.
6232
Flashcards
Who served as the Vice-Chancellor of 
the Sanskrit University and was a 
prominent figure in the Swaraj Party?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
6233
Flashcards
Which village is identified as the origin 
or 'Biji' of the Samraul Pali Brahmin 
line?
Pali.
6234
Flashcards
In the genealogical entries, what is the 
significance of the term 'Dau'?
It indicates maternal grandfather or lineage 
descent through a daughter (Dauhitra).
6235
Flashcards
Who was the son of Maharaja Samar 
Singh and a key figure in the Purnia 
Brahmin lineage?
Maharaj Amar Singh.
6236
Flashcards
Which text was revised and re-edited by 
Kumar Girijanand Singh?
Vedanand Vinod.
6237
Flashcards
The term 'Mool' in the Panji system 
refers to the _____.
Ancestral village or root of a lineage.
6238
Flashcards
Which specific branch of the family 
moved from Banaili to Srinagar?
Raja Shrinandan Singh's lineage.
6239
Flashcards
Who was the 'Shikari Samrat' (King of 
Hunters) and weather expert in the 
Banaili family?
Raja Kirtyanand Singh.
6240
Flashcards
Which member of the family is noted for 
building a Sanskrit Pathshala in Kashi 
(Varanasi)?
Rani Chataravati (wife of Kumar Chatranand 
Singh).
6241
Flashcards
The genealogist Choti Jha spent his 
entire life under the protection of which 
Purnia-based royal family?
Surgan Loam.
6242
Flashcards
According to the Panji records, who was 
the 'Biji' (founding ancestor) of the Pali 
village line?
Kapildev.
6243
Flashcards
Which title was held by Vedanand Singh, 
reflecting his status in the Banaili 
family?
Raja Bahadur.
6244
Flashcards
Who was the 'Dharmadhikaranak' 
(Officer of Justice) mentioned in the 
lineage of Lakhima Devi?
Mahamahopadhyaya Gadadhar.
6245
Flashcards
Which village served as the residence for 
the family of Amarnath Jha in Purnia?
Teacher Colony.
6246
Flashcards
What was the professional title of 
Phanishwarnath, a descendant of 
Shyanamanand?
B.A. (Bachelor of Arts), indicating his 
educational qualification.
6247
Flashcards
Who was the father of Kumar 
Ganganand Singh?
Raja Kamlanand Singh.
6248
Flashcards
Which specific discipline was 
Ganganand Singh a 'shining star' of in 
the literary sky of Mithila?
Maithili Literature.
6249
Flashcards
The Panji records for the 'Bagani 
Rupaspur' branch are found on which 
page of the first volume?
Page 134.
6250
Flashcards
Who was the 'Mahamahopadhyaya' who 
was a contemporary of the scholar 
Lakhima Devi?
Rameshwar.
6251
Flashcards
Which lineage is linked to the village of 
'Sultanpur' and the 'Palasi' region?
The descendants of Raghupati.
6252
Flashcards
Who was the daughter of Raja Dular 
Singh whose marriage is noted in the 
Sarisab lineage?
Dulahiti.
6253
Flashcards
In the context of the Banaili Raj, what is 
'Garh Banaili'?
A central fort or administrative seat of the 
Banaili estate.
6254
Flashcards
The text mentions a 'Sangeet Martand'; 
what does this title signify?
A person with the highest mastery or 'Sun' of 
music.
6255
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
'Kanjha' or 'Khadgi' branch of the family?
Banaili.
6256
Flashcards
Who is the 'Biji' ancestor of the Alayigar 
Bagani line?
Gangadhar.
6257
Flashcards
Which descendant of Raja Dular Singh 
was known for his expertise in the 
Ayurveda Shastra?
Raja Vedanand Singh.
6258
Flashcards
Who was the 'Anhal' ancestor in the 
lineage of Vishnupur?
Hariam.
6259
Flashcards
Which family member was an engineer 
(Abhiyanta) in the branch of Girijanand?
Raman Ji.
6260
Flashcards
What is the primary language used for 
the titles and names in the genealogical 
map?
Maithili (written in Devanagari script).
6261
Flashcards
Who was the father of the music expert 
Kumar Shyanamanand Singh?
Raja Kirtyanand Singh.
6262
Flashcards
Which descendant of the Pali line is 
noted as a 'Sanchar Nideshak' (Director 
of Communications)?
Abhiyanta Shankar.
6263
Flashcards
Which town in Nepal is mentioned as 
being near the residence of one of the 
descendants (Pankaj)?
Janakpur.
6264
Flashcards
Who was the 'Panji Manager' during the 
period of 1300â€“1375 AD?
Lakhima Devi.
6265
Flashcards
The term 'Utehtdh' in the Panji system 
refers to a subdivision related to _____.
Lineage purity and social standing.
6266
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
'Sudar Sodarpur' lineage?
Parshmani.
6267
Flashcards
Who was the 'B.A. Bank Officer' 
mentioned in the Purnia branch?
Kavitar Jha.
6268
Flashcards
Which ancestor is linked to the 'Kakarol' 
and 'Mahiya Sodarpur' branches?
Mahesh Dutt.
6269
Flashcards
Who is identified as the 'Tantrik' 
(practitioner of Tantra) in the Taranagar 
branch?
Nityanand Singh.
6270
Flashcards
The 'Dyodhi' system in the text refers to 
which social structure?
Royal households or sub-estates within a larger 
Raj.
6271
Flashcards
Who was the 'Education Minister' of 
Bihar mentioned as part of the Banaili 
family?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
6272
Flashcards
Which person is noted for his role in the 
'Swaraj Party'?
Kumar Ganganand Singh.
6273
Flashcards
The text spans generations of the 
'Maithil' community; which specific 
caste group is the focus?
Maithil Brahmins.
6274
Flashcards
What does the term 'Pustak' signify in 
the context of Choti Jha's work?
A genealogical register or record book.
6275
Flashcards
What is the chronological scope covered 
by the 'Genealogical Mapping' within the 
'Panji Prabandh' text?
The records span from 450 AD to 2009 AD.
6276
Flashcards
In the context of the Panji records, who 
is recorded as the husband of Manjula?
Subhash Kumar.
6277
Flashcards
Identify the residence associated with 
Rajkumar and Subhash Kumar's wife, 
Manjula.
They are residents of Jamua.
6278
Flashcards
According to the text, who are the two 
sons of Ashok Mishra, a resident of 
Timardoul?
Arun Kumar and Aditya.
6279
Flashcards
Who is listed as the daughter of Mahant 
Jha and a resident of Jamua?
Manjula.
6280
Flashcards
The lineage of Parmanand includes three 
sons named Shyambodh, Jagatnath, and 
_____.
Kedarnath.
6281
Flashcards
Who is the son of Jagatnath and a 
resident of Purnia?
Ayush.
6282
Flashcards
What professional title is held by Vijay 
Kumar at Kameshwar Singh Sanskrit 
University, Darbhanga?
Professor and Registrar.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
6283
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Professor Vijay 
Kumar mentioned in the genealogical 
map.
Bhaskar and Prabhakar.
6284
Flashcards
In the lineage of Jattalal, who is his son? Tilak.
6285
Flashcards
Following the lineage of Jattalal, who is 
the son of Tilak?
Tilaknath.
6286
Flashcards
Within the descendants of Tilaknath, 
who is the son of Uchitlal?
Vriddhanand.
6287
Flashcards
Who are the sons of Vriddhanand as 
listed in the records of Range-ra?
Gopikanth, Vedanand, Nawal Kishore, 
Shambhunath, Anati, Anuplal, and Purushottam.
6288
Flashcards
Identify the residence and familial link of 
Rasmohan Jha.
He is a resident of Susena and the father-in-law 
of Sushil Kumar.
6289
Flashcards
Who is the son of Babulal and the father 
of Parmanand, Dharmanand, and 
Sarvanand?
Vishnudev.
6290
Flashcards
The daughters of Shyambodh are listed 
as Sweety, Rani, Supriya, and _____.
Kajal.
6291
Flashcards
Which village is associated with the 
family of Gajanand and Triloknath?
Dholbajja.
6292
Flashcards
Who is the son of Triloknath and the 
father of Neeraj, Dheeraj, and Rupesh?
Uchiti.
6293
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Gajanand 
mentioned in the text.
Triloknath and Sanjay.
6294
Flashcards
Which location is cited for the family of 
Nand Kumar, son of Matnu Lal?
Gangoli.
6295
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Reetlal listed 
in the lineage of Gangoli?
Ramkrishna, Harikrishna, Devkrishna, and 
Chitrabodh.
6296
Flashcards
Identify the daughter of Reetlal who 
married Lekhnath from Araria Badgam.
Purnima.
6297
Flashcards
Who is the father of Rajesh and Rakesh, 
residents of Jamua?
Gokulanand.
6298
Flashcards
In the lineage of Harikrishna, who are 
his two sons?
Gokulanand and Mathuranand.
6299
Flashcards
Identify the professional role of 
Satyanand, son of Shivanand, as 
mentioned in the Nepal section.
He is an Engineer residing in America.
6300
Flashcards
Who is the son of Satyanand residing in 
America?
Dr Nashira.
6301
Flashcards
Within the Sultanpur region, who are the 
two sons of Ravi Dev?
Shivdev and Raghudev.
6302

In the Sultanpur Madanpur lineage, who 
was the son of Ram Sundar?
Krishnakant or Vishnukant
8068
Flashcards
Janardan's three children mentioned at 
the start of the Mandar (Madre) section 
are Khetan, Bhavai, and _____.
Devnatha
8069
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Narottam 
mentioned in the Mandar records?
Mahesh and Bandhu
8070
Flashcards
Shubhankar's son Balkrishna was 
associated with which village?
Deshual
8071
Flashcards
Mishr Raghu's five children were Das, 
Bachhru, Nandan, Sundar, and _____.
Dina
8072
Flashcards
Who was the father of Kirtinath in the 
Sultanpur Bhareshwar lineage?
Hari
8073
Flashcards
Hemnath's two sons, mentioned in the 
Sultanpur records, were Mathuranath 
and _____.
Dwarikanath
8074
Flashcards
Who was the father of the three brothers 
Narayandatt, Khagesh, and Jayanand?
Bholanath
8075
Flashcards
Jayanand's four sons were Tofalal, 
Babulal, Genalal, and _____.
Bhailal
8076
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Gangaram 
mentioned in the Bhareshwar records?
Jivan and Devan
8077
Flashcards
Munilal's two sons were identified as 
Bateshnath and _____.
Chulhai
8078
Flashcards
Kankir's two sons, associated with 
Bhareshwar, were named Mahavir and 
_____.
Devchandra (Thithar)
8079
Flashcards
Mahavir had ten sons; name any three 
mentioned in the text.
Chandranand, Suryanand, and Indranand
8080
Flashcards
Ramanand's son, a resident of Gadhi 
Parsha, was named _____.
Ajay
8081
Flashcards
Sawalal's son, known as Umakant or 
Gopal, resided in which village?
Sahudi
8082
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Lakshminath 
(Shrilal's son)?
Bachcha and Sudinlal
8083
Flashcards
Who were the four sons of Premanath in 
the Sultanpur Bhareshwar lineage?
Ramanath, Dayanath, Shaktinath, and Ajabnath
8084
Flashcards
Harilal's two sons in the Sultanpur 
Khavashpur lineage were Nityanand and 
_____.
Arjun
8085
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Devrup 
mentioned in the Khavashpur records?
Vasukinath and Baidyanath
8086
Flashcards
According to the Madre Diha records, 
who was the son of Jagannath?
Amatuhu
8087
Flashcards
Vatu's son, mentioned in the Madre Diha 
lineage, was named _____.
Ranjan
8088
Flashcards
Who was the father of the brothers 
Gaurinath and Ramnath?
Jnana
8089
Flashcards
Harinarayan's three children in the 
Shripur Chauri lineage were Bhaiya, 
Hira, and _____.
Liladatta
8090
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Mahadev in 
the Shripur records?
Harinarayan and Asharam
8091
Flashcards
In the lineage of Ramdev, who was the 
son of Bholai?
Chhatari
8092
Flashcards
Bholai's son Ramchandra had three 
daughters named Gauri, Jai, and _____.
Devi
8093
Flashcards
In the Dumariya lineage, who were the 
two sons of Narayanadatt?
Atmaram and Jhumaklal
8094
Flashcards
Atmaram's son, associated with Samauli 
Pali, was named _____.
Radhanath
8095
Flashcards
In the Mandar (Maderai) Jagatpur 
lineage, who are the three sons of 
Nardeva?
Anand, Gopal and Roopa.
8096
Flashcards
According to the Sultanpur (Jamua) 
records, who are the four sons of 
Umrao?
Shyamal Kishore, Bal Kishore, Naval Kishore 
and Jugal Kishore.
8097
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur (Belwadi) lineage, 
Shripathi was the father of Vanshamani, 
who in turn fathered _____.
Kalidasa.
8098
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Shyamal 
Kishore in the Sultanpur Jamua lineage?
Baidyanath and Singheshwar.
8099
Flashcards
Term: Dau (à¤¦à¥Œ)
Definition: A genealogical term signifying a 
daughter's son.
8100
Flashcards
Term: Du Dau (à¤¦à¥ à¤¦à¥Œ)
Definition: A genealogical term signifying a 
daughter's daughter's son.
8101
Flashcards
In the Mandar Jagatpur records, Gopal is 
listed as having two sons: Harihar and 
_____.
Narsingho.
8102
Flashcards
Who were the four sons of Umrao's son, 
Bal Kishore, in the Jamua lineage?
Dudheshwar, Devnath, Nageshwar and a third 
unspecified individual.
8103
Flashcards
In the Mandar lineage, what are the 
names of the two sons of Vishwambhar?
Raghunath and Parashuram.
8104
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Parashuram in 
the Mandar lineage.
Bachnu and Nandlal.
8105
Flashcards
Which specific title is associated with 
Madhukant from the Mandar lineage?
Jyotishacharya (Principal).
8106
Flashcards
In the Mandar lineage, who are the four 
sons of Bachnu?
Umanath, Hemnath, Ramanath and Rajnath.
8107
Flashcards
What academic qualification is explicitly 
noted for Jaydev in the Mandar 
(Jagatpur) lineage?
B.A. Hindi Visharad.
8108
Flashcards
The sons of Kanhaiya in the Mandar 
lineage are identified as Chamaklal and 
_____.
Ravinath.
8109
Flashcards
In the Jamua lineage, who are the two 
sons of Singheshwar?
Punyanand and Subodh.
8110
Flashcards
Identify the professional title held by 
Yogananad (also known as Sushil) in the 
Mandar lineage.
Vakil (Advocate).
8111
Flashcards
In the Mandar Jagatpur line, who are the 
four sons of Chamaklal?
Jaydev, Krishnadev, Chandradev and Shyamdev.
8112
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Krishnadev in 
the Mandar lineage?
Kalanand and Tirthanand.
8113
Flashcards
The sons of Chandradev in the Mandar 
lineage are Shaktishekhar, Indrashekhar 
and _____.
Ratnashekhar.
8114
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
were the two sons of Mishra Ratna?
Harmadi and Tufani.
8115
Flashcards
Who is the son of Tufani in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Chandidutt.
8116
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, the 
sons of Dukhiya are listed as Jhotan, 
Lotan, Tadu and _____.
Bulna.
8117
Flashcards
Which individual from the Sultanpur 
Belwadi lineage is the son of Lotan?
Dwarikanath.
8118
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the 
two sons of Krishnaram are Nenan and 
_____.
Hanumandatt.
8119
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Bhailal 
mentioned in the BatchLM merge 
excerpts?
Mohit Lal, Navchit Lal and Anugrah Lal.
8120
Flashcards
In the Jamua lineage, who are the two 
sons of Gopal?
Sukumar and Umra.
8121
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Shringaramani 
mentioned in the Jamua lineage?
Avadhamani and Chakramani.
8122
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Panchanand 
(also known as Panchlal).
Jaldhar, Upendra and Dayanand.
8123
Flashcards
In the Mandar lineage, who are the two 
sons of Upendra?
Taranand and Kamlanand.
8124
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Kamlanand in 
the Mandar lineage?
Madhav and Keshav.
8125
Flashcards
The sons of Kripananad in the Mandar 
lineage are Kishore and _____.
Kumod.
8126
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the two sons of Laxmikant?
Ravindranath and Devanarayan.
8127
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Mayakant in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Bodhnarayan and Ajit.
8128
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who 
are the three sons of Baldev?
Anirudh, Arjun and Sitaram.
8129
Flashcards
The sons of Anirudh in the Sultanpur 
Belwadi lineage are Vinod, Amod and 
_____.
Kumod.
8130
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Dharmapath in 
the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Dharmanath and Jaynath.
8131
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the four sons of Baidyanath?
Triloknath, Vijaynath, Phulendranath and 
Udaynath.
8132
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Bateshwarnath 
in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Surendra and Kushendra.
8133
Flashcards
What titles are associated with Surendra 
in the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Dharmashastra Karmakanda Sahityacharya.
8134
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who 
are the two sons of Surendra?
Mrityunjay and Janmejay.
8135
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Yogendra 
(also known as Radhakant)?
Bharat, Shatrughna and Suman.
8136
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the two sons of Shivanand?
Bhavanand and Devanand.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8137
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Bhavanand in 
the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Pramod and Pankaj.
8138
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, the 
sons of Nityanand (Nengdu) are 
Ramchandra and _____.
Lakshman.
8139
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Virendra in 
the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Bambam, Aditya and Vikku.
8140
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who 
are the two sons of Lakshman?
Ganesh and Pradeep.
8141
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Prakash in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Abhishek and Lokesh.
8142
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the six sons of Nrupnath's son 
Munshai?
Jaydev, Haridev, Vasudev, Vishnudev, Shukdev 
and Satyadev.
8143
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Haridev in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi records?
Jagannath and Manoj.
8144
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, 
identify the two sons of Vasudev.
Prayag and Madhav.
8145
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Vishnudev in 
the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Shambhunath and Kashinath.
8146
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the three sons of Shukdev (also 
known as Bengali)?
Narayan, Vishwanath and Kedarnath.
8147
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Satyadev (also 
known as Bauku).
Khushinath, Mahendranath, Raghunath and 
Ashoknath.
8148
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, who 
are the two sons of Khushinath?
Shivkumar and Phulkumar.
8149
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Yashinath 
(also known as Khalifa)?
Manujan, Manbodh and Balbodh.
8150
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, 
identify the two sons of Manujan.
Ramakant and Sundarkant.
8151
Flashcards
Who are the six sons of Ramakant in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Lakshmikant, Mayakant, Premkant, Jaykant, 
Shrikant and Hemkant.
8152
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the 
son of Premkant is _____.
Nishikant.
8153
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Sundarkant in 
the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage.
Fakir (Udaykant), Golok, Vishnulok and a 
fourth unspecified individual.
8154
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi lineage, who 
are the three sons of Udaykant?
Gopal, Amaresh and Rupesh.
8155
Flashcards
Who are the three sons of Balbodh in the 
Sultanpur Belwadi lineage?
Krishnabodh, Jagdish and Avadhesh.
8156
Flashcards
In the Sultanpur Belwadi records, the 
sons of Krishnabodh (Jagdish) are 
Avadhesh, Niranjan and _____.
Yogendra.
8157
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Jyotishacharya 
Madhukant in the Mandar lineage.
Rajesh, Ramesh, Rakesh and Sukesh.
8158
Flashcards
In the Mandar lineage, who are the two 
sons of Rajesh?
Chandan and Kundan.
8159
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Vedakant in the 
Mandar lineage?
Anand Prakash and Om Prakash.
8160
Flashcards
In the Mandar lineage, identify the three 
sons of Umakant.
Kalikant, Kamlakant and Mayakant.
8161
Flashcards
Who are the two sons of Mayakant in the 
Mandar lineage?
Varun and Pramod.
8162
Flashcards
In the context of the Maithil Panji 
(genealogical records), what does the 
term 'Beeji' represent?
The founding ancestor or progenitor of a 
specific lineage.
8163
Flashcards
According to the text, who is the Beeji 
(progenitor) of the Bhanupur Pawan-
Chob lineage?
Haridatta.
8164
Flashcards
Who was the first person to earn an MA 
in the combined Purnia district and 
served as a member of the Bihar 
Legislative Assembly?
Pt. Punyanand.
8165
Flashcards
Pt. Punyanand, a prominent figure in the 
lineage, lived between which years?
1890â€“1965.
8166
Flashcards
What is the name of the literary work 
authored by Pt. Punyanand mentioned in 
the records?
Mithila Darpan.
8167
Flashcards
Pt. Punyanand was noted for being an 
excellent scholar of which language?
English.
8168
Flashcards
The Takwal Nima (or Takwade Nima) 
lineage identifies _____ as its founding 
Beeji.
Haripani
8169
Flashcards
In the Panji system, what does the term 
'Mool' refer to?
The original ancestral village or the root of a 
specific clan.
8170
Flashcards
The term _____ is used in the text to 
indicate the family or village where a 
daughter was married.
Dau
8171
Flashcards
Which two sons of Hitnath are recorded 
in the lineage following Radhanath?
Jayanand and Punyanand.
8172
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Pt. 
Punyanand according to the records of 
the Jhanjharpur branch?
Upendra and Nagendra.
8173
Flashcards
In the Pawan-Chob Haridatta lineage, 
who were the three primary sons of 
Haridatta?
Mahadeva, Shrideva, and Harideva.
8174
Flashcards
Which individual is credited in the text 
as the founder of a Sanskrit Pathshala?
Chandranand (resident of Khamgada).
8175
Flashcards
Identify the academic qualification of 
Shilpa, the daughter of Sushil Kumar.
MCA (Master of Computer Applications).
8176
Flashcards
What is the profession or title of 
Sudarshan, the son of Ramnarayan (BA)?
Engineer (Abhiyanta).
8177
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Jagdish (BA) 
mentioned in the Jhanjharpur/Ratauli 
branch?
Pramod and Amod.
8178
Flashcards
Randhir (BA), a descendant in the 
lineage, is identified as holding what 
professional position?
Bank Official (Bank Padadhikari).
8179
Flashcards
Who was the son of Shulapani in the 
Takwal Nima lineage?
Shankhapani.
8180
Flashcards
The sons of Shankhapani's son Ratnapani 
were Kaviraj Lakshmipani and _____.
Nayadev
8181
Flashcards
In the Maldwad branch, who were the 
two sons of Shrikant?
Radhakant and Umakant.
8182
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Radhakant in 
the Maldwad lineage?
Padmanand, Tirthanand, and Kirtyanand.
8183
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Padmanand who 
resided in Maldwad.
Arun and Varun.
8184
Flashcards
Which descendant of the Maldwad 
branch is noted for having a B.Sc. 
degree?
Divakar.
8185
Flashcards
Who were the four sons of Kamlakant 
residing in Katahar-badi?
Rajanand, Sarvanand, Brahmanand, and Shankar.
8186
Flashcards
In the Sarvanand lineage, who are the 
two sons of Prakash?
Prince and Jiya (daughter).
8187
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Uttamlal 
mentioned in the Madanpur/Pandua 
records?
Harikant, Mayakant, and Devikant.
8188
Flashcards
What academic title was held by 
Prabhakant, the son of Mayakant?
Vyakaranacharya (Teacher of Grammar).
8189
Flashcards
Pranav, the son of Prabhakant 
Vyakaranacharya, earned which degree?
B.Sc.
8190
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Vinod-kant (MA) 
in the Bharishwar branch?
Praveer Kumar, Ashutosh, and Sumit.
8191
Flashcards
In the Kamalpur branch, who were the 
four sons of Shrikant?
Shyamakant, Chandrakant, Dayakant, and 
Indrakant.
8192
Flashcards
What dual professional qualifications 
are listed for Sanjay, the son of 
Shyamakant (MA)?
MA and BL (Bachelor of Laws).
8193
Flashcards
Shravan, a son of Shyamakant, holds the 
degrees of MA and _____.
BL
8194
Flashcards
Who are the four sons of Chandrakant 
recorded in the Tega-chhiya branch?
Nishikant, Gopikant, Manikant, and Rajnikant.
8195
Flashcards
Identify the degrees held by Indrakant, 
the son of Shrikant of Kamalpur.
MA and CL.
8196
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Jaykant 
mentioned in the Tega-chhiya branch?
Shivkant, Shashikant, and Devkant.
8197
Flashcards
Shivkant, a descendant of Jaykant, held 
what traditional academic title?
Vyakaranacharya.
8198
Flashcards
Who is the BA-qualified son of Shivkant 
Vyakaranacharya?
Rajendra.
8199
Flashcards
In the Majlispur branch, who were the 
three sons of Navilal?
Lalitnath, Bholanath, and Phanindranath.
8200
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Lalitnath in 
the Majlispur records?
Daranath and Teknath.
8201
Flashcards
The five sons of Teknath are Narayan, 
Surendra, Bhuvneshwar, Madneshwar, 
and _____.
Prakash
8202
Flashcards
In the Phanindranath lineage, who were 
the three sons?
Jaynath, Jagannath, and Shivnath.
8203
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Jaynath 
residing in Phulbari?
Shambhunath and Bandhunath.
8204
Flashcards
Identify the four sons of Madanmohan 
(son of Bholanath) in the Bhanupur 
branch.
Chandranand, Shridhar, Giridhar, and Ramanand.
8205
Flashcards
Who were the three sons of Ramanand 
mentioned in the Belbari branch?
Yugalkishore, Kamalkishore, and Rajkishore.
8206
Flashcards
In the Bholanath lineage, who were the 
three sons of Giridhar?
Krishnakant, Jaykant, and Maheshkant (also 
Suresh, Naresh, and Umesh).
8207
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Parmanand (son 
of Chandramohan) in the Bhanupur 
lineage?
Shiv-shankar, Bhuvneshwar, and Dineshwar.
8208
Flashcards
In the Takwal Nima lineage, who were 
the three sons of Kaviraj Lakshmipani?
Harihar, Padmapani, and Gangadhar.
8209
Flashcards
According to the Takwal Nima records, 
who were the three sons of Harihar?
Narayan, Damodar, and Rama.
8210
Flashcards
Who were the three 'Sharma' sons of 
Damodar in the Takwal Nima lineage?
Ravisharma, Harisharma, and Lakshmisharma.
8211
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Jagannath in the 
Harisharma lineage.
Horai and Dhirai.
8212
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Sadupadhyaya 
Chand?
Vishnupati and Shivpati.
8213
Flashcards
The four sons of Shivpati are Shankar, 
Balbhar, Shrikanth, and _____.
Nilkantha
8214
Flashcards
Who was the son of Balbhar who held 
the title of Chaudhary?
Chaudhary Harinarayan.
8215
Flashcards
In the Takwal Nima Chaudhary line, who 
were the sons of Chaudhary Harinarayan?
Bhaiya (alias Shrikrishna), Bandhu, and 
Purandar.
8216
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Bandhu in the 
Takwal Nima lineage?
Lala and Kali.
8217
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Lala in the 
Takwal Nima branch.
Kashinath and Baidyanath.
8218
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Haripani's son 
Shulapani?
Shankhapani and Kirtipani.
8219
Flashcards
In the Jivkant branch, what is the name 
of the son of Sudhakant?
Abhishek.
8220
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Premkant in the 
Jivkant branch?
Rakesh, Vimlesh, and Kamlesh.
8221
Flashcards
Identify the two sons of Shravan (MA, 
BL) mentioned in the Sirsiya branch.
Shubham and Sandeep.
8222
Flashcards
Who was the son of Manorath in the 
Pawan-Chob lineage who had two sons 
named Shyam and Gena?
Saheb.
8223
Flashcards
The two sons of Gena were Arjun and 
_____.
Damodar
8224
Flashcards
Who was the son of Shyam mentioned in 
the Dharampur/Raghunathpur lineage?
Nand-lala.
8225
Flashcards
In the Haridatta lineage, who were the 
two sons of Gangadhar?
Gopal and Madhav.
8226
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Gopal in the 
Haridatta branch?
Harihar and Sudhakar.
8227
Flashcards
In the Pawan-Chob records, who were 
the two sons of Ganadhi?
Gaurishwar and Deveshwar.
8228
Flashcards
Who were the sons of Deveshwar (alias 
Sadupadhyaya)?
Murari, Bhramar, and Banmali.
8229
Flashcards
In the Banmali lineage, who were the 
three sons of Vikram?
Ghanshyam, Lakshman-ram, and Ram-das.
8230
Flashcards
Who were the two sons of Ghanshyam in 
the Pawan-Chob branch?
Rachit and Bandhu.
8231
Flashcards
Identify the three sons of Rachit 
recorded in the Pawan-Chob lineage.
Kulapati, Ramapati, and Santoshi.
